text:
Once upon a time, there was a wise old owl.

Every evening, he read stories in his cozy burrow. The wisest owl.

One night, he heard such curious chatter.

There, a squirrel said, "Tell tales of grand adventures!"

The owl believed.

He swung down.

A river roared.

On slippery stones.

Swift as thoughts.

That squirrel had ears.

With wings?

He soared!

To find stars?

That's how.

They twinkled.

Then dove deep.

Ghosts!

That rabbit knew.

Of shadowy thoughts.

We laugh.

Just like cats.

That owl knew.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
